description: Browse, slice, and analyze the curated American Reindustrialization company directory and jobs board

tools.name: categories_counts
tools.description: Map of category_id -> company count. Returns the CountMap.

tools.name: categories_get
tools.description: Get one category by slug. Required: slug. Returns the Category.

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: List every category (bare array). Returns array of Category.

tools.name: categories_search
tools.description: Search categories by query string. Required: q. Returns array of Category.

tools.name: companies_get
tools.description: Get one company by slug (returns the full object directly, not wrapped). Required: slug.

tools.name: companies_list
tools.description: List companies with pagination and optional server-side filters. Optional: page, limit (default: 20), state (plus 1 more). Returns the CompanyPage.

params.name: state
params.description: Filter by HQ state code (e.g. CA, TX)

tools.name: companies_search
tools.description: Full-text search across company names and descriptions; returns a bare array. Required: q.

tools.name: news_list
tools.description: List news items (returns a bare array; empty at capture).

tools.name: openings_categories
tools.description: Autocomplete list of categories that have at least one opening. Returns array of Category.

tools.name: openings_companies
tools.description: Autocomplete list of {id, name} for companies that currently have open openings. Returns array of CompanyRef.

tools.name: openings_get
tools.description: Get one job opening by slug. Required: slug. Returns the Job.

tools.name: openings_list
tools.description: List job openings with pagination and optional server-side filters (work_mode and experience_level are honored; state is silently ignored upstream — use `openings find` for cross-resource filters). Optional: page, limit (default: 20), work_mode (plus 1 more). Returns the JobPage.

params.name: experience_level
params.description: Filter by experience level (entry, mid, senior, lead)

tools.name: openings_tags
tools.description: Autocomplete list of tags that appear on at least one opening. Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: openings_titles
tools.description: Autocomplete list of job titles matching the query. Optional: q. Returns array of string.

params.name: q
params.description: Query prefix (empty returns the full title list)

tools.name: tags_counts
tools.description: Map of tag_id -> company count. Returns the CountMap.

tools.name: tags_get
tools.description: Get one tag by slug. Required: slug. Returns the Tag.

tools.name: tags_list
tools.description: List every tag (bare array). Returns array of Tag.

tools.name: tags_search
tools.description: Search tags by query string. Required: q. Returns array of Tag.
